name: sqlite3
title: sqlite3
description:
Command line interface for SQLite 3
SQLite is a C library that implements an SQL database engine.
Programs that link with the SQLite library can have SQL database
access without running a separate RDBMS process.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sqlite3 because Command line interface for SQLite 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sqlite3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sqlite3 [options] [databasefile] [SQL]` as documented upstream for sqlite3.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sqlite3 is a terminal-based front-end to the SQLite library that can evaluate queries interac-` as documented upstream for sqlite3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sqlite3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sqlite3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
